---
title: "Preface"
unnumbered: true

uomthesis:
  candidate:
    forename: "Jane"
    middle_initial: "Q"
    surname: "Doe"
    native_name: ""

  degree: "PhD"
  faculty: "Humanities"
  school: "Alliance Manchester Business School"
  division: "MSM"
  year: 2027

  thesis_format: "standard"

  declaration:
    variant: "either"
    joint_authorship_details: null

  ai_disclosure:
    include: false
    tools: []
    description: null

  content_notification:
    include: false
    summary: null

  optional_prelims:
    lay_abstract: false
    dedication: null
    acknowledgements: true
    preface: false

  resubmission:
    is_resubmission: false
    revisions_file: null

  covid_impact_statement: null

mainfont: "Times New Roman"
linestretch: 1.0
pdf-engine: lualatex
lang: en-GB
---

This page exists only to hold project metadata for Quarto.
